name: Street Style Motion
commercial_use: Social ads, lifestyle campaign, collection storytelling
visual_goal: Make the outfit feel wearable, current, and active in a real-world setting.
composition: Full-body or three-quarter frame captured mid-step on an urban street.
model_direction: Move naturally, look to the side or slightly past camera, keep posture confident.
styling_notes: Use practical accessories that make the outfit feel lived-in but still polished.
lighting: Natural daylight or soft overcast light, balanced skin tones, no harsh distractions.
camera_language: 35mm street photography look, slight environmental context, crisp subject focus.
prompt: Professional street style fashion photograph of a model wearing the featured outfit while walking through a clean urban setting, natural movement, polished styling, soft daylight, modern lifestyle campaign mood, sharp garment visibility.
negative_prompt: busy background, random pedestrians distracting, motion-smudged clothing, unflattering angle, distorted architecture
